title: rosa sepium var. stipularis
intro: Rosa sepium var. stipularis, also known as dog rose, is a plant species that belongs to the rose family and is characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible hips. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa sepium var. stipularis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to support digestive health and immune function.
